title: Meta Ads Campaign Brief
description: Input for scripts/create_campaign.py. Fills a full Campaign -> Ad Set -> Creative(s) -> Ad(s) structure. Budgets are in the ad account's MINOR units (cents for USD: 2000 = $20.00).

api_version.description: e.g. v21.0. Defaults to v21.0 / META_API_VERSION.

account.description: Overrides the env vars per-brief. Leave a field out to use the env var.

page_id.description: Facebook Page id ads run under (or META_PAGE_ID)

instagram_actor_id.description: Optional IG account id for IG placements (or META_INSTAGRAM_ACTOR_ID)

objective.description: OUTCOME_TRAFFIC for landing-page visits (lead magnets); OUTCOME_LEADS for on-Meta lead forms or pixel lead events.

daily_budget.description: Minor units, e.g. 2000 = $20.00/day. Use this OR lifetime_budget.

lifetime_budget.description: Minor units. Requires start_time AND end_time.

optimization_goal.description: LANDING_PAGE_VIEWS or LINK_CLICKS for cold traffic; OFFSITE_CONVERSIONS once a pixel has data.

bid_amount.description: Minor units. Only with a capped bid strategy.

start_time.description: ISO 8601, e.g. 2026-08-01T09:00:00-0700. Omit to start on activation.

destination_url.description: Landing page URL — include UTM params for attribution.

flexible_spec.description: Interest/behavior AND/OR groups. Each interest needs a real Meta id.

creatives.description: One ad per creative. Give 2-4 variations to let Meta optimize.

name.description: Internal name; defaults to the headline.

primary_text.description: The main body copy above the image.

image_url.description: Publicly reachable image URL (e.g. a hosted Canva export).

call_to_action.description: LEARN_MORE, SIGN_UP, GET_OFFER, DOWNLOAD, SUBSCRIBE, GET_STARTED, ...
